hero.subtitle: KORWAQ develops next-generation solution partner and enterprise software that helps manufacturers streamline operations, improve productivity and grow with confidence.

why.title: Why KORWAQ
why.subtitle: We build enterprise software with a clear focus on manufacturing — simple, scalable and designed for the long term.

architecture.title: Modern Architecture
architecture.text: A modular, future-ready architecture built for long-term growth and evolving business needs.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing Focus
manufacturing.text: Software designed specifically for production planning, inventory management and operational workflows.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.text: Security principles integrated into every layer, from access control to data protection.

cloud.title: Cloud Ready
cloud.text: Designed to run on cloud infrastructure with the flexibility your operations require.

scalable.title: Scalable
scalable.text: Grows with your business — from small factories to multi-site manufacturing operations.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.text: Optimized for the speed and reliability that production environments demand.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: An enterprise software product family focused on manufacturing. Our first product, KORWAQ Solution Partner, is currently under development.

solution_partner.name: KORWAQ Solution Partner
solution_partner.desc: Enterprise software that unifies production planning, inventory management and business operations on a single platform.
solution_partner.desc_long: KORWAQ Solution Partner is enterprise software designed for manufacturing companies. It unifies production planning, inventory management, procurement, sales and financial operations on a single platform. As our first product, it is actively under development.

mes.desc: Software for monitoring, managing and optimizing shop floor operations.
mes.desc_long: Software for real-time monitoring, management and optimization of shop floor operations. Supports production efficiency and quality control processes.

wms.desc: Management software for warehouse operations, inventory tracking and logistics processes.
wms.desc_long: Comprehensive management software for warehouse operations, inventory tracking and logistics processes. Designed to improve warehouse efficiency.

crm.desc: Software for customer relationships, sales processes and business development operations.
crm.desc_long: Enterprise software for customer relationships, sales processes and business development. Tailored to the sales and customer management needs of manufacturing companies.

hr.desc: Enterprise software for human resources, payroll and employee management processes.
hr.desc_long: Enterprise software for human resources, payroll and employee management. Planned to support the HR operations of manufacturing businesses.

ai.desc: Artificial intelligence capabilities supporting production and operational decision-making.
ai.desc_long: Artificial intelligence capabilities supporting production and operational decision-making. To be developed for data-driven insights and intelligent automation.

about_preview.title: Building Software for Manufacturing Companies
about_preview.text: KORWAQ is a technology company developing modern enterprise software for manufacturing companies. Our goal is to simplify complex business processes through simple, scalable and intuitive software. We are actively working on our first product, KORWAQ Solution Partner.

updates.title: Latest Updates
updates.subtitle: News from the KORWAQ Solution Partner development process and insights on manufacturing software.

post1.excerpt: We have started the development process for our enterprise software designed for manufacturing companies.

post2.excerpt: The limitations of general-purpose software in manufacturing and the value of industry-specific solution partner platforms.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: We are a technology company developing modern enterprise software for manufacturing companies.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: KORWAQ was founded after observing how businesses in the manufacturing sector manage complex operational processes. We recognized that general-purpose software does not always meet the needs of production environments. We decided to develop modern enterprise software focused on production planning, inventory management and business operations. Today, we are actively working on our first product, KORWAQ Solution Partner.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To simplify business processes for manufacturing companies through modern, scalable and intuitive software. To contribute to the digital transformation of manufacturers at every scale by making technology accessible.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become a trusted and preferred enterprise software platform in the manufacturing sector. To support operational excellence across a wide range — from factories to growing businesses — with the KORWAQ product family.

modern.title: Modern
modern.text: We build future-ready software with current technologies and design principles.

professional.title: Professional
professional.text: We deliver a consistent and reliable experience at enterprise standards.

reliable.title: Reliable
reliable.text: We stand behind our word and communicate honestly without exaggeration.

minimal.title: Minimal
minimal.text: We reduce complexity and design simple, understandable solutions.

innovative.title: Innovative
innovative.text: We develop next-generation approaches tailored to the needs of the manufacturing sector.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.text: We build scalable, secure and long-term software infrastructure.

solutions_page.title: Solutions
solutions_page.subtitle: An enterprise software product family focused on manufacturing. Each product is designed for the real needs of the manufacturing sector.
solutions_page.cta_text: Contact us to learn about our development process or share your feedback.

careers_page.title: Careers
careers_page.subtitle: Do meaningful work at KORWAQ. Join a team building software that transforms the manufacturing sector.
careers_page.status_text: KORWAQ is not running an active recruitment process at this time. Future openings will be published on this page. If you are interested, you may send your resume to info@korwaq.com.
careers_page.future_subtitle: As we grow, we will look for talented professionals in the following areas.
careers_page.area_engineering_desc: Backend, frontend and enterprise software development.
careers_page.area_product_desc: Manufacturing-focused product strategy and user experience.
careers_page.area_design_desc: Enterprise interface design and user experience.
careers_page.cta_title: Let's Work Together in the Future
careers_page.cta_text: Contact us to learn about KORWAQ or submit your resume.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.subtitle: Reach out for questions, feedback or collaboration proposals.
contact_page.form_error: Please fill in all required fields.
contact_page.faq1_q: When will KORWAQ Solution Partner be available?
contact_page.faq1_a: KORWAQ Solution Partner is currently in active development. A launch date has not been set yet. Follow our blog for updates or reach us at info@korwaq.com.
contact_page.faq2_a: Our target customers are manufacturing companies, industrial businesses, factories and growing SMEs. Our software focuses on production and operational processes.
contact_page.faq3_q: Can I request a demo or early information?
contact_page.faq3_a: Yes. You can use the contact form or email info@korwaq.com to learn about the KORWAQ Solution Partner development process or share feedback.
contact_page.faq4_q: Are there career opportunities at KORWAQ?
contact_page.faq4_a: We do not have an active hiring process at this time. Visit our careers page for future opportunities or send your resume to info@korwaq.com.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.intro_text: At KORWAQ, we respect your privacy. This privacy policy explains how information is handled when you visit korwaq.com.
privacy_page.collect_text: We may collect information you submit through the contact form, such as your name, email address, company name and message content. Language preference and similar data may also be stored in your browser's local storage (localStorage) for the website to function properly.
privacy_page.use_text: We use the information we collect solely to respond to your request, communicate with you and improve our services. We do not sell or rent your information to third parties.
privacy_page.cookies_text: Our website uses your browser's localStorage to remember your language preference. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.
privacy_page.rights_text: To request access, correction or deletion of your personal data, contact us at info@korwaq.com.
privacy_page.contact_text: For questions about this privacy policy, email info@korwaq.com.
